tracks.rawText: 2:48La calle mutilav5.5Banda rap with tuba-led brass riffs, trombone punches, clarinet countermelodies, and a tight tambora-snare groove under trap hats and 808 sub-bass, Dark minor-key verses, gritty vocal doubles, DJ scratches, and wide reverb on hook stacks, Sparse breakdowns, then full banda brass hits for a raw streetwise lift2PublishRemix
tracks.title: La calle mutila

tracks.rawText: 0:21[Rec] May 13 06:12:39UploadReggae and dancehall fusion, The track features a syncopated bassline with a heavy sub-bass profile, a crisp snare on the third beat, and a rhythmic electric guitar playing staccato upstrokes on the offbeats, A bright, melodic brass section provides punchy accents and melodic fills, The male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, melodic patois style with a moderate amount of reverb, The tempo is 82 BPM in the key of G minor1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] May 13 06:12:39

tracks.rawText: 0:26[Rec] May 13 06:12:16UploadReggaeton with a heavy dancehall influence, A prominent dembow rhythm is driven by a punchy, dry kick drum and a crisp snare hitting on the sixteenth-note syncopations, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick pattern, A bright, staccato synth lead plays a repetitive melodic hook, High-pitched, energetic male vocals deliver rhythmic, chanted phrases with a slight auto-tune effect, The track is in the key of G minor at 95 BPM1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] May 13 06:12:16

tracks.rawText: 0:11[Rec] May 13 06:11:38UploadReggaeton with a heavy dembow rhythm at 90 BPM in the key of G minor, The track features a deep, sub-heavy synth bass that follows the kick drum pattern, A bright, staccato synth lead plays a repetitive melodic hook with a short decay, The percussion consists of a sharp, high-frequency snare on the offbeats and a punchy kick drum, A male vocal performs in a rhythmic, melodic rap style with heavy autotune and short delay effects, Atmospheric synth pads provide a sustained harmonic background during the transitions1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] May 13 06:11:38

tracks.rawText: 3:43doble balav5.5Corridos tumbados fused with sad sierreño, regional mexicano urbano, and trap corrido: distorted electric guitar riff with palm-muted eighth notes, acoustic sierreño requintos, nylon-string arpeggios, bass guitar, and d-beat drums colliding with 808 sub-bass, snare rolls, vocal echo throws, and full-band, melancholic intensity1PublishRemix
